subcodes.first_line: O Rustam Bahman! The friends in Bandar-'Abbas are, in truth, steadfast and firm, and know their God. Convey unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم بهمن احبای بندر عباس فی الحقیقه ثابت و مستقیم و خدا شناسند آنانرا از قبل بنده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
